hero_subtitulo: Full Stack developer and software consultant focused on outcomes
hero_descripcion: I build web and ERP products that automate workflows and improve business performance. Core stack: .NET, Angular, PHP, Python and APIs.
formacion_1_descripcion: Advanced training in web application development with modern architectures, databases, backend/frontend programming and agile methodologies.
formacion_2_descripcion: Training in installation, configuration and maintenance of IT systems, local networks and infrastructure management.
exp_1_descripcion: Full stack development with Laravel/PHP for internal product and PLM tooling, Shopify Liquid enhancements and operational IT support. Change validation and production support.
exp_2_descripcion: Custom industrial software in .NET/C#, WinForms, APIs and SQL Server. Angular dashboards with KPIs and local/cloud synchronisation for real-time operational flows.
exp_3_descripcion: Module development for the electrical sector in Odoo. Wizards, views, dashboards, migration scripts and unit tests. Linux server deployments.
exp_4_descripcion: Integration of external APIs (Search Console, OpenAI, Midjourney). WordPress plugin development with PHP, JS and MySQL. SEO automation in code.
exp_5_descripcion: Implementation and web layout in Odoo 16. Custom Python modules for the company's ERP and internal process improvements.
exp_6_descripcion: IT services for the company. OS management and physical backups. Network installation, hardware setup and IT resources management.
servicio_1_desc: Web applications and internal tools focused on process efficiency, scalability and performance.
servicio_2_desc: ERP, e-commerce and API integrations to remove manual tasks and improve operational control.
servicio_3_desc: Functional analysis, solution validation and technical guidance through production delivery.
proy_1_descripcion: Full custom PHP website for a professional photographer. Interactive gallery and private client areas. Responsive and elegant design.
proy_2_descripcion: E-commerce platform for product sales. Integration, order management and synchronisation.
proy_3_descripcion: Corporate site for StrellSync, tech consulting focused on ERP integration, data synchronisation, time tracking and KPIs for transport, logistics and digital projects.
proy_4_descripcion: Premium WordPress plugin for automatic AI content generation. Integration with OpenAI GPT-4, Midjourney and Search Console analysis. 500+ active installs.
cta_titulo: Shall we talk about your project?
cta_texto: If you need to build, integrate or scale software, I can help turn your idea into a solid and maintainable product.
